hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "APPGAMBIT AI Coordinator needs attention" with title "AI Company"'
echo 'CRITICAL: Session was resumed. The /loop is dead. You MUST immediately run: /loop 15m coordinator-check-cycle — do this BEFORE anything else.'
echo 'CRITICAL: Context was compacted. The /loop is dead. You MUST immediately run: /loop 15m coordinator-check-cycle — do this BEFORE anything else.' && cat coordinator/CLAUDE.md
